health_score_note: Down 1 to 84/B (2026-06-01 vs 2026-05-31): Security PR #15388 (OAuth CSRF) now 4 days old without merge; P1 bugs #13193 (89d stale) and #13608 (74d stale) remain unaddressed; open issues up 5 to 893. Offset by v1.9.8 release and 4 PRs merged today.

age_distribution.note: 100/100 sampled issues updated within last 30 days (API sorts by updated_at DESC). 5 confirmed zombies from prior exhaustive search.

label_health.unlabeled_note: 10% of 100-issue sample have no labels (up from 5.5% yesterday) — triage backlog growing

p1_issues.title: [Feature]: Unified Notification Center
p1_issues.author: SiinXu
p1_issues.detail: Formal P1 planned feature — persistent notification center (system events, usage alerts, official announcements) with OS-level toast, unread badge, 30-day retention. Milestone v2.4.0.

p1_issues.title: [Bug]: xiaomi mimo response only displays the last line
p1_issues.author: lsy08
p1_issues.detail: Streaming bug: mimo-v2-flash only shows last token in rotating display. 8 comments. Last updated 2026-03-19 — no assignee, no fix in progress.

p1_issues.title: [Bug]: Azure OpenAI defaults to responses API instead of chat/completions — Resource not found 404
p1_issues.author: simplezhao
p1_issues.detail: Regression v1.7.19→v1.7.22: Azure OpenAI uses /responses endpoint instead of /chat/completions. 4 upvotes. Assignee: DeJeune. No update in 88 days.

security_alerts.title: [Bug]: MCP OAuth callback accepts first code without state validation
security_alerts.detail: OAuth CSRF attack vector: state parameter not validated before token exchange in MCP OAuth callback. Fix PR #15388 open 4 days — needs immediate merge review.
